name: Zucchini Brownie Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. Combine brown sugar, shortening and vanilla in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs and beat into creamed mixture.
3. Gradually combine flour, cocoa, baking soda and salt. Mix into creamed mixture at low speed just until blended. Stir in zucchini and chocolate chips.
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough 2 inches (5 cm) apart onto an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time at 375°F (190°C) for 7 to 9 minutes, or until cookies are set. Do not over bake. Cool 2 minutes on baking sheet. Remove cookies to foil to cool completely. About 3 dozen cookies
